name: Liebes-Knoten (Love Knots)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well with an electric mixer.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until smooth.
3. Add salt and vanilla, then continue beating.
4. Slowly incorporate flour at low speed until the mixture forms a cookie dough consistency.
5. Roll the dough very thin on a lightly floured surface.
6. Cut into 1/2-inch strips using a knife or pastry cutter.
7. Further cut each strip into crosswise pieces, approximately 1 1/2 inches long.
8. Twist each piece to resemble a bow.
9. Fry in deep fat at 375 F until golden brown.
10. Roll each piece in sifted powdered sugar before serving.
